hero.title1: Lose weight with a plan that's built around
hero.description: Doctor monitored weight loss combining medical checks, realistic habits, and safe options when you qualify.

whatIs.title: What "doctor monitored weight loss" really means
whatIs.description: Not a crash diet, detox, or a one-time injection. It's a medically supervised plan where a doctor checks your health risks, tracks progress, and adjusts strategy.
whatIs.card1Desc: Overweight at BMI 23, Obesity at BMI 27.5
whatIs.card2Desc: Blood pressure, cholesterol, and metabolic markers
whatIs.card3Desc: Focus on fat loss, not just scale weight

whyKL.title: Why many people in Kuala Lumpur choose medical help
whyKL.description: Weight gain isn't just about willpower. Hormones, insulin resistance, medications, and stress can push appetite and cravings higher.
whyKL.check3: Struggle with intense hunger or cravings

process.title: What happens at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur
process.subtitle: Step by step, with no guesswork

treatments.title: Treatment options inside your plan
treatments.description: Not everyone needs medication. When appropriate, it makes the first phase easier.
treatments.importantNote: These medicines require a medical assessment and prescription. They are not "quick fixes." Always disclose GLP-1 use before any surgery due to aspiration risks under anesthesia.

results.title: What results can you expect?
results.description: Weight loss is gradual. Clinical trials show average loss around 14.9% at 68 weeks with semaglutide and lifestyle changes.

comparison.title: Choose your path
comparison.subtitle: Medical weight loss vs other options
comparison.option1Desc: Overall fat loss, appetite control, metabolic health

whyNexus.title: Why Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur
whyNexus.description: A doctor monitored program, not an influencer plan. Clear steps from assessment to maintenance.
whyNexus.bookButton: Book a consultation at Nexus Clinic

faq.q1: What is doctor monitored weight loss?
faq.a1: A medically supervised plan where a doctor checks health risks, tracks progress, and adjusts your plan over time.
faq.a2: Using Asian BMI cut-offs: overweight at 23, obesity at 27.5, plus health risks assessment.
faq.a3: When prescribed and monitored by a doctor, yes. Never self-source or self-dose.
faq.q4: How soon will I see results?
faq.a4: Appetite changes first, weight loss starts within weeks and improves over months.

cta.title: Ready for a weight loss plan that's monitored, realistic, and safe?
cta.description: Start with a proper assessment, then follow a plan designed for your body and lifestyle.
